vlm.summary: Daytime street view from inside a car on a multi-lane urban road behind other vehicles, approaching an intersection with traffic signals.
vlm.interpretation: The scene appears to show normal vehicular traffic on an arterial street in a city setting, with signal-controlled intersections and overhead utility lines.
objects: gray SUV ahead in right lane
partial dark vehicle at right edge

observations: overhead power lines cross the scene
vlm.scene_type: urban arterial road with signalized intersection
mobility: no bicycle or transit vehicles clearly visible

approaching an intersection requires attention to signal changes
